meaning: vi.缠结,混乱,吠,咆哮,怒骂vt.使缠结,搞乱,咆哮着说n.咆哮,吼叫,怒骂,缠结,混乱
examples: Josh bares his pointy teeth in a vicious snarl.
Her mouth was contorted in a snarl.
The dog bared its teeth in a snarl.
There was the goat-shaped one, Alexander, with a snarl for a face and pin-thin legs.
He spoke in an exhausted snarl, all redemptive possibility purged from his voice and manner.
